runTitle: Vercel targeted QA - AI ranking route live recovery
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production guest session -> dashboard -> AI sidebar flow
AI sidebar query: 현재 메모리 사용률 상위 3대 알려줘
AI sidebar query: 현재 CPU가 가장 높은 서버 알려줘
Ranking responses return live current-metric ordering on production
Analysis basis summary shows 서버 메트릭 상세 조회 for ranking queries

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after production QA; effective usage 11.0956 USD, billed 0.0000 USD. No unexpected usage spike was observed.

completedImprovements.title: Memory top-N ranking uses deterministic live metric path on production
completedImprovements.evidence: Production QA: 현재 메모리 사용률 상위 3대 알려줘 returned db-mysql-dc1-primary 71% > api-was-dc1-01 65% > api-was-dc1-02 59%, with analysis basis summary showing 서버 메트릭 상세 조회.

completedImprovements.title: CPU highest-server query returns live top server on production
completedImprovements.evidence: Production QA: 현재 CPU가 가장 높은 서버 알려줘 returned lb-haproxy-dc1-01 CPU 75%, with analysis basis summary showing 서버 메트릭 상세 조회.

completedImprovements.title: Cloud Run service traffic restored to latest revision
completedImprovements.evidence: Service traffic spec/status now points 100% to LATEST (ai-engine-00333-gks), removing the stale ai-engine-00329-jvq pin that kept production on the previous ranking path.

notes: Production issue was not data mismatch; Cloud Run service traffic was pinned to ai-engine-00329-jvq while newer revisions were created and retired without receiving traffic.
Manual traffic correction moved production to ai-engine-00333-gks, after which both memory and CPU ranking queries returned the expected live ordering.
Preventive fix was committed in deploy.sh so future Cloud Run deploys fail if latest revision is not actually serving traffic.
Console log remained clean during the targeted Vercel AI sidebar session (0 warnings or worse).
